title: caladenia × eludens
intro: Caladenia × eludens, commonly known as the 'ghost orchid', is a rare and hybrid species of orchid, resulting from the cross between Caladenia flava and Caladenia xanthochila. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities. The health benefits of Caladenia × eludens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a sought-after herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and powdering the rhizomes, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules.
